---
title: "Dengue Situation Dashboard"
description: "The dashboard typically includes various features and components to help stakeholders, such as public health authorities, researchers, and the general public, understand and analyze the dengue situation."
image: featured.png
image-height: "500"
image-width: "1200"
categories:
  - Dashboard
  - Visualization
  - Deangue 
---

```{=html}
<iframe frameborder="0" scrolling="yes" seamless="seamless" style="display:block; width:100%; height:100vh;" src="https://hossainlab.github.io/dengue-situation-dashboard/" title="Dengue Dashboard"></iframe>
```

```{=html}
<a href="https://hossainlab.github.io/dengue-situation-dashboard/" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Live Dashboard</a>
```
